two_factor.title: Kerekere rua-nu
two_factor.subtitle: Kami ivolava na 6-tikitaki code kina %{email}. Soli ena lalo me kerekere.
two_factor.enter_six_digits: Soli na 6-tikitaki code vua na imeledi
two_factor.could_not_resend: Sa solia na ivolava vou na code
two_factor.status_on_body: Sa kerekere, kami ivolava na 6-tikitaki code kina %{email}.
two_factor.status_off_body: Vakadagu na malolo kina ivolava na code vua imeledi sa kerekere.
two_factor.code_prompt: Sikova na 6-digit na code sa emi na ivolavola mai:
two_factor.turn_off_msg: Na iyalau ni aratau e sega ni dui vakalalai. E kami na ivolavola na code e kina kina ko ikau.
two_factor.enabled_alert_body: Muri ira, e o na vakacacayaki kina na ivolavola code e raica kina ko ikau.
two_factor.disabled_alert_body: Na iyalau ni aratau e sega ni dui vakacacayaki na ivolavola code sa raica kina.
two_factor.help_text: Na kena rawa: eda vakatapua na password, e kami na ivolavola na 6-digit na code ki na ivolavola. Na code e mosi eda na 10 minutes dredre, ka 5 na were e dua na code vei ira ka sona.
two_factor.could_not_send: E sega ni rawa na ivolavola na code
two_factor.could_not_verify: E sega ni rawa na kina kina na code
two_factor.menu_sub: Ivolavola code sa raica mo na dui vakalalai
home.no_match: E sega ni na ibalebale e talaqa kina na raica
home.no_match_body: Talaqa na mate filter, vakaloloqu kina na kategori, o mai mai — na matanitu ibalebale e tiko mai nikuday.
orders_screen.title: Na ibalebale
orders_screen.empty_body: Ibalebale e dua na ibalebale mai na sellers sa India, ka e raica kina kovi. Tracking, refunds, and re-ordering sa tiko sa dua na noqu vakavewa.
wishlist.title: Na Wishlist
wishlist.signin_sub: Kina na items e mudu dina ko ikau, ka raica kina nasusuva sa dua na tamata.
wishlist.empty_sub: Tiko na love sa dua na ibalebale e sega na kina e muri. E kami na vakadirokoni ki na piso e vilivili.
welcome_coupon.title: Bula — {{pct}} off na ibalebale ni unuqu{{cap}}
welcome_coupon.copied_body: {{code}} — vakayavala sa checkout e raica na discount.
empty_state.no_matches_sub: Talaqa na mate na vakaveivataki, na vakaloloqu kina na kuwa, o raica na kategori e muri.
empty_state.find_anything_sub: Talaqa "kurta", "spices", "handicrafts"… o raica na kategori e muri.

order_detail.refund_footnote: Your bank typically posts refunds within 5–10 business days. If you don't see it after that, share this reference with your card issuer or our support team.
order_detail.cancel_modal_body: We'll refund {{amount}} to your card. Picking a reason helps us improve the experience for everyone.

seller_earnings.title: Earnings
seller_earnings.empty_period: No sales in this period yet.
seller_earnings.empty_window: No sales in this window yet.
seller_earnings.footer_a: Na mataniveivataki ni platform e vakatigani:
seller_earnings.footer_c: ni vakauyavu i kalougata e dina,
seller_earnings.footer_d: ni vakauyavu i jewellery. Na kena vakayacori e cakacaka e vakamacitaki kina e gadrevi ni iyau vakalevulevu ka sega ni vakabulia na mataniveivataki ni cutivata & matanibeti — sarava
seller_earnings.footer_e: ni vakabaleta na siga e cakava.
seller_referrals.title: Taravosa & Kila
seller_referrals.invite_sent_body: Na {{email}} e raica na email vinaka sara.
seller_referrals.hero_title: Taravosa sa valavala ni ganau ni India
seller_referrals.hero_sub: Kila 5 % ni mataniveivataki ni platform ni vakauyavu ni gauna ni unuqu na NZ$10,000 ni GMV — vakausa ni NZ$500 e dua na taravosa i rua na vula na 12.
seller_referrals.placeholder_name: Na yavusa ni gauna (sega ni mata)
seller_referrals.no_referrals_sub: Taravosa na gauna ni unuqu e vakauri — e vakamatanita kina e vakavinavinaka.
seller_referrals.how1: Volavola na iyau code se invite link sa matanivucu ni ganau ni India.
seller_referrals.how2: E vakavulavulau kina na seller e vakauyavu na iyau code.
seller_referrals.how3: E mate se na volavoli na kena unuqu na sale, e kila 5 % ni mataniveivataki ni platform ni vakauyavu ni unuqu na NZ$10,000 GMV.
seller_referrals.how4: Na mataniveivataki e volavoli kina sa macawa kina sa iyau na payouts wallet (vakausa ni NZ$500 e dua na taravosa, 12-vula na window).
toasts.try_again_moment: Vakauri na vakacegu sa gadrevi ni siga.
toasts.verify_email_sent_body: Bukia na link i iyau inbox — e dina kina 24 na ora.
toasts.invoice_emailed: Na invoice e volavola kina sa email

toasts.order_cancelled_received: Na iyau cancellation e raicake. Na refund e volavoli vinaka sara.
toasts.delivery_confirmed_body: Vinaka! Na iyau return window e vakakaramata vakacegu e dua ni mea sega ni dina.

confirms.remove_items_msg: E bogi e na vei na nomu isinilisili na lista. E keda ni kauta vou anumanu.

seller_returns_screen.no_returns_body: Na dropu e keda ni vakacegu na bogi ena 7 na mataka e na sobu.
seller_returns_screen.buyer_proof_video: Na vini na siqataki na dropu
seller_returns_screen.approve_body: Na bikinibiki na {{amount}} e mani vakabuibui ki na dropu ena NZD. E kena kila na ivolisolo donu ri dua na kena vakatau.
seller_returns_screen.decline_body: Na dropu e kena kilai na nomu na vakatau. Vakadonui na kena kauta na mudra kena donu na nona kilai.
seller_returns_screen.approve_placeholde: Mea ni mada para ki na dropu…
seller_returns_screen.decline_placeholde: Vakadinadina sa gauna sa tabu ni ibaibaki...

seller_returns_screen.return_declined_bo: A mai koya a vakamacalataki na.

seller_signup.title: Seller signup

seller_signup.referral_sub_post: — sa maroroya o rau e yatikotiko tukuna 5 orders.
seller_signup.referral_hint: E sa biutaki — wale ni walowalo ka e sega na code.
seller_signup.terms: E sa qaqa tiko, e rau na vakacetaki ni bisinisi ni rau a sa vakamatalatala ena India kei na 'au katoa ni magalati na ivolau ena Allsale.

Resend e sega ni vakasaravada: {{reason}}

seller_documents.title: Vakaceguvi na iSolisoli ni bisinisi
seller_documents.photo_id_hint: Aadhaar, PAN card, Driving licence or Passport
seller_documents.privacy_title: Na kena vakayacora na rau na documents
seller_documents.permission_needed_body: E biutaki na vakaidai ena rau na photos na salave ni volavola na documents.
seller_documents.both_required_body: Vakavolavola e rau na photo ID kei na balebale ni bisinisi na kena qaqa.
seller_documents.policy_required_body: Vakasosoqta kei na vakaidai na Seller Policy, Payment Hold Policy, kei na Return Policy na kena volavola.
seller_documents.submitted_body: Na gaigai e duidui ena review. E 'au taba vei kemudou ena 7 business days.
seller_documents.upload_failed: Na volavola e sega ni vakaloloma
admin_commission.title: Vakamatau ni Vakacegu
admin_commission.failed_load: Sa sega ni matau na kena kauta
admin_commission.no_paid_orders: E sega ni kena vakadinadina sa vakayacova tiko na vakavuna
admin_commission.active_tiers: Vakacegu vakatau sa sega ni tabaka
admin_commission.footnote: Na vakacegu sa kena vakamatau mai na vakayaca na tier map ki yani na kena vakadinadina sa vakayacova tiko. Edita `services/stripe_connect_svc.py` kena kalougei na kategori vakacegu.
seller_stripe.get_paid_body: Vakavaki na kena iloilo vakadinadina kena Stripe koya na vei kena mataka kina na iloilo mai na kena vakadinadina kina na 14-na siga return window sa kena kupunaboro.
seller_stripe.active_body: Na iloilo sa kena raica sa vakavaki. Sa kena mataka kina na kena tovolea mai na kena vakadinadina ki na banisiteri ni kena automatiki.
seller_stripe.finish_body_more_details: Stripe sa kailoa na itikotiko sa kena kauta vinaka koya na iloilo sa vakavaki.
seller_stripe.finish_body_didnt_finish: Kua vakamata na kena vakavaki kei na sega ni kumpliti — tapu ni lalo kena kumpliti na kena vakavaki.
seller_stripe.toast_couldnt_load: Sa sega ni vakamata na Stripe kupuna
seller_stripe.toast_couldnt_start: Sa sega ni vakamata na Stripe onboarding
seller_stripe.toast_couldnt_open: Sa sega ni bulai na Stripe dashboard
seller_stripe.info_payouts_body: Kina na kena vakadinadina sa kena mataka, sa kena nona na kena iloilo mai na yabaki sa escrow kena 14 na siga (na return window). Kina na kena kupunaboro na window kina sega ni return, sa kena mataka na kena iloilo — automatiki — ki na banisiteria na vakavaki ni Stripe kina Isitoria.
seller_stripe.info_fees_body: Allsale marketplace commission sa 12% na vakadinadina (sega ni shipping). Stripe standard processing fee sa kena raica kina Allsale — sega ni kena dilinga mai na kena iloilo.
seller_bulk_edit.title: Bulk edit listings
seller_bulk_edit.action_set_price_hint: Na lelevu NZD vakadinadina kina yani
seller_bulk_edit.toast_couldnt_apply: Sa yacova kina sa e rawa ni vakaceguvolavola
seller_bulk_edit.delete_msg_one: Sa vakabulabula vinaka talega ni 1 listing? Kina sa e rawa ni vakaboli.
seller_bulk_edit.delete_msg_other: Sa vakabulabula vinaka talega ni {{count}} ni listing? Kina sa e rawa ni vakaboli.
seller_support_index.title: Tickets ni suporiti
seller_support_index.no_tickets_body: Vakasama ni suporiti e dua na kakayavata, mataqu, KYC, kaya kena i taucoko kina? Ikolevu ni ticket kena i olora vakalevu kina ni cokovata ni suporiti.

admin_ambassadors_index.couldnt_load: Sa yacova kina sa e rawa ni vakaloaloa

seller_support_new.help_text: E yacova kina mai {{time}} kena i {{priority}} priority tickets.
seller_support_new.describe_placeholder: Steps to reproduce, order/payout IDs, expected vs actual…
seller_support_new.warning_text: E sega ni vakasama ni password, card numbers, kaya buyer's personal info.
seller_support_new.limit_reached_body: You can attach up to 4 screenshots.
seller_support_new.permission_needed_bod: We need access to your photos to attach screenshots.
seller_support_new.subject_too_short_bod: Vakacaucau vakamosimosi na ivindaka ni tikiti (4+ valavala).
seller_support_new.need_more_detail_body: Vakacaucau vakamosimosi na mate ni lolovata isai 10 valavala.
seller_support_new.couldnt_raise: E sega ni vakavolui na tikiti
admin_ambassador_detail.mark_paid_failed: Magiti vakavola e sega ni vakavolu
admin_ambassador_detail.reason_too_short: E kailailatu na kamatua isai 4 na valavala
admin_ambassador_detail.reject_reason_bo: Na cava na kamatua ni solia oqo?
admin_ambassador_detail.reject_default_r: E sega ni vakaitavi na marama ni yalomatanitu
admin_ambassador_detail.no_balance_btn: E sega na balense na magiti
seller_support_detail.couldnt_load: E sega ni vakalolovu na tikiti
seller_support_detail.couldnt_submit_rat: E sega ni vakaveivataki na vakavakatabu
seller_support_detail.close_msg: E sega ni vakakaudre na vakaveivanei.
seller_support_detail.rate_prompt_body: Tapu na vakavakatabu 1–5 na bitabita ni oqo na tikiti.
seller_support_detail.rate_modal_body: Na vakavakatabu ni iko e vakatali na suporiti vakatakitaki na vakavakaviqo. Tapu na bitabita.
seller_financing.title: Vakaveilomani vakaviqo
seller_financing.hero_title: Vakakurata na vakaveilomani isai na marama
seller_financing.hero_body: E sega ni veiyataniveisuva T+5/10 vakamalolo ni vakaveilomani. Na NBFC ni imatanisiga e vakakurata 70–90% ni vakaveirautaki isai 24h. E magiti 1–2% — vakaveivataki, vakadinadina na go.
seller_financing.apply_sub: We'll forward your details to the partner. They'll contact you within {{hours}}h to run their KYC.
seller_financing.interest_noted_body: {{name}} will be in touch within {{hours}}h. We've also notified Allsale support.
admin_team.title: Team
admin_team.intro_body: Invite team members and scope their access by role. Sub-admins log in with email + password at the admin screen.
admin_team.confirm_remove_msg: This permanently deletes the admin account.
admin_team.share_password_body: Share this password with the new admin over a secure channel. They should change it on first login.
admin_team.share_reset_body: Share via a secure channel. The admin should rotate it after logging in.
seller_upgrade.title: Become a seller
seller_upgrade.intro: You're already signed in. Just add your business details below and we'll verify your company against Indian government formats.
seller_upgrade.referral_sub_a: Enter their code below to get
seller_upgrade.referral_sub_b: — and they earn a bounty when your business ships its first 5 orders.
seller_upgrade.referral_hint: Optional — leave blank if you don't have a code.
seller_welcome.title:
Vakarau ni nomu na noda na vakamalolo
ki na drau ni NZ.
seller_welcome.subtitle: Allsale e vakayacori na noda na bisinisi vei India e dua na kena registrition ki na drau ni New Zealand. Vakavereitaka ka mamadomu ni vakamalolo sa miniti.
seller_welcome.req1_body: Solo-trader gigs sega ni maroroya — na platform oqo e vakarau na noda na kumpani.
seller_welcome.req2_body: E oti na tabakualitaka nomu na bisinisi ki na Indian government format.
seller_welcome.req3_body: Talica na vakataki ka vakabarikobiko na drau.
seller_welcome.policy_text: Na drau e vakamalolo mula New Zealand (allsale.co.nz). Na vakamalolo e kailai na lave kumpani sa India. E sega ni cutaka na dradra dra o na noda na cakacaka sa gauna oqo.
seller_welcome.already_have_account: Tiko na koya tu na Allsale account?
seller_pro.title: Allsale Pro
seller_pro.hero_title: Malolo na vakamalolo, vakabauta na noda.
seller_pro.hero_body: Allsale Pro e vakatavi nomu na commission mula 12% ki 9% ka vakamaroroya na noda na mesinimesini vakamalolo e talica na dravudravuwai vakamalolo.
seller_pro.active_title: O koya tu na Allsale Pro
seller_pro.will_cancel_body: E vakabauta sa mataka ni nomu na gauna oqo.
seller_pro.benefit1_body: Vakatavi 25% sa bula dina. Tabake kera o vakamatatau sa ₹17k monthly GMV.
seller_pro.benefit2_body: Gold star sa bula dina dina — vakamaroroya na lift conversion 5–15%.
seller_pro.benefit3_body: Pro vakamalolo e kilakila na noda na vakaidina & search results.
seller_pro.benefit4_body: Tabu ₹1,000/mo kera — vakabauta nomu na best SKU na bulibuli.
seller_pro.benefit5_body: Same-day response. Dispute resoled faster, cash released sooner.
seller_pro.benefit6_body: Conversion by SKU, traffic sources, abandoned-cart insights.
seller_pro.not_enabled_msg: Na noda team e malolo na pricing. Check back soon.
seller_pro.confirm_cancel_msg: Nomu na benefit e tiko na vakamatatau sa mataka ni nomu na billing period. Muri mada e rawa na bauta ki na standard 12% commission.
seller_pro.cancel_scheduled_msg: Pro e tiko na vakamatatau sa mataka ni period.
seller_sponsored.title: Sponsored placements
seller_sponsored.hero_title: Boost na na noda na vakamalolo
seller_sponsored.hero_sub: Pay-per-click. Top up nomu na wallet, set a daily budget, pause anytime.
seller_sponsored.empty_body: Promote a listing sa home, category and search pages. O na set nomu na daily budget ka pay only when shoppers click.
seller_sponsored.delete_msg: Oqo e stop promotion para {{name}}. Stats e keep para billing.
seller_sponsored.hint_estimate: Kena vakatonudredre na kakibaci: {{clicks}} klik/matanidani. Kua vakamacala sara nai via vakamatai keda dredre me vuki na budete ni matanidani kece, ka vakagoleva nai bubutaki.
seller_sponsored.couldnt_create: Sa dou sega ni kaya na vulaka na vakamataidia
seller_sponsored.wallet_meta: Muri na ${{topup}} · kena sekenisiga ${{spent}} sa dredre
seller_sponsored.opening_stripe_body: Na kena balavu ni taba kua vakavuravura se muri na yacumani.
seller_sponsored.topup_failed: Sa dou sega ni kaya na muri
seller_profile.could_not_load: Sa dou sega ni kaya na veivacivaci
seller_profile.permission_needed_msg: Kua dina na balavu keda i na domo ni au fokovalevu me vutia na au igoigo ni wawalagi.
seller_profile.upload_failed: Sa dou sega ni kaya na vutia
seller_profile.saved_msg: Na korokoro ni au wawalagi kua vakavuravura.
seller_profile.could_not_save: Sa dou sega ni kaya na seivuta
seller_profile.check_input_msg: Vosoti na au macawa ni gauna ni sega kina kena nanumi se na macawa mau kena dina ≥ 8 kena ivolatabu kina kesa kena tabana.
seller_profile.password_updated_msg: Na luva veiwekavui sa dou vakaqoli se vakasali.
seller_profile.could_not_change_password: Sa dou sega ni kaya na vakavuravura na macawa ni gauna
seller_profile.signout_confirm_msg: Au kua tu vakasali i ai. Na luva veiwekavui kua dina na vakasali na muri.
seller_profile.signout_done_body: Na luva veiwekavui sa dou vakasali na muri.
seller_profile.banner_hint: Kiliki me vutia se na igoigo ni banner wawalagi (16:9)
seller_profile.bio_placeholder: Veitutuvatu vakaindiya kena dina — kena dravudravu i Jaipur
seller_profile.address_warn: Na vakavuravura ni veigalau kua vakadamu na muri na KYC review ni makitaki (7-matanidani SLA).
seller_profile.payout_help: Na korokoro ni penikoke e vakakikila kina na makitaki me vakamacala na muri. Na vakadravudravu ni kena dina e gauna Stripe — sara na kena ivolatabu 4 na akawunti kua seivuta.
seller_profile.pause_sub: E vakamacala na au yalayala mai na kila veitamata i kalougata.
seller_profile.away_label: Daunidani vakacavacava (vakakikila kina na veiqaravi kena dina)
seller_profile.away_placeholder: Kua muri i 20 July — na matamata kua dredre nai bubutaki.
seller_profile.shipping_help: Gauna sa i vakagona na baleta. Matanidani me roro kina keda me vakadravudravu se vakadua se muri na yacumani.
seller_profile.title: Store profile
seller_profile.signout_all_btn: Sign out i ya na iyalayala dina
seller_referrals_game.title: Referral rewards
seller_referrals_game.couldnt_share: Na share sheet a sega ni vakacegui
seller_referrals_game.share_message: Au bu vakavunataka na bisinisi au kei Allsale — Indian sellers era ka yaco na 15% lifetime commission. Jio kei na link au: {{url}}
seller_referrals_game.empty_first_title: Be the first on the leaderboard
seller_referrals_game.empty_first_body: Invite one verified seller this {{period}} to jump straight to #1.
seller_referrals_game.footer_hint: We approve a referee once they pass business verification. You earn 15% of platform fees on their first 12 months of orders.
seller_new_listing.title: Posting vou
seller_new_listing.photos_hint: First photo is the cover. Add up to {{max}} photos.
seller_new_listing.photo_limit_msg: You can add up to {{max}} photos per listing.
seller_new_listing.photos_perm_msg: Open Settings to allow photo access so you can upload product images.
seller_new_listing.stock_oos_hint: 0 stock means buyers will see this as "Out of stock".
seller_new_listing.size_placeholder: e.g. S, M, L, XL or Free Size
seller_new_listing.sizes_hint: Optional. Leave empty for one-size items.
seller_new_listing.description_placehold: Tell buyers about materials, dimensions, what makes it special.
seller_new_listing.err_name_desc: Name and description (10+ chars) are required
seller_new_listing.err_price: Enter a valid price in NZD
seller_new_listing.err_photos: Please add at least one product photo.
seller_import.title: Import catalog
seller_import.step0_sub: Bring your existing listings from Amazon or Flipkart and we'll have them live in minutes — no re-typing required.
seller_import.source_amazon_blurb: Upload the .xlsx/.xlsm catalog template you use for Amazon India.
seller_import.source_flipkart_blurb: Upload the .xls catalog file you downloaded from Flipkart.
seller_import.source_csv_blurb: A simple CSV with sku, name, price, image. We handle the rest.
seller_import.step1_sub: Drag the file your marketplace gave you. We accept .xlsx, .xlsm, .xls and .csv up to 25 MB.
seller_import.couldnt_read_body: Try again with a different file.
seller_import.margin_help: Apply across all imported items to cover shipping & profit.
seller_import.ai_help: Translates Hindi/Hinglish descriptions to English and rewrites long blurbs into clean 5-bullet feature lists.
seller_import.step4_failed_one: {{n}} row failed. Check the seller dashboard for details.
seller_import.step4_failed_other: {{n}} rows failed. Check the seller dashboard for details.
admin_users.title: Users
admin_users.search_placeholder: Search by email, name, or company
admin_users.no_results_for: No results for "{{query}}". Try a different query.
admin_users.no_users_for_filter: There are no users for this filter.
admin_users.reactivate_msg: The buyer/seller will be able to sign in again immediately.
admin_users.reset_2fa_msg: The user will be able to sign in WITHOUT their authenticator app on the next login. Only do this after verifying their identity.
buyer_categories.title: Vakabulabula
buyer_categories.subtitle: India → New Zealand · 7-12 days courier
buyer_returns.title: Na gadreva return
buyer_returns.empty_body: O ikayau na 7 na matanisiga mai na delivery ena kau ni vakabalavata na return. Kacini tu na vakaitaki, o koya na magaka mai irikova ena veqe ni approval status.
buyer_returns.reason_damaged: Na balabala e na gadreva delivery
buyer_returns.reason_not_described: Sega ni o vakasama e na description
buyer_returns.reason_changed_mind: Na vakabago e na gadreva no
buyer_points.title: Allsale Points
buyer_points.rate_cap: 📦 Up to 50% of cart na kaya vakayacora ena points
buyer_points.empty_text: Walang gadreva vua. Na vakatakoto na order o na cakacaka na review ena kau ni kaya vinaka! ✨
buyer_compare.title: Vakacautaura ({{count}})
buyer_compare.empty_body: Na tai "Add to compare" e na yaloka product ena kau ni vakadidia na side-by-side comparison (up to 4 items).
buyer_notifications.title: Notifications
buyer_notifications.empty_body: Order updates, cancellations and delivery alerts na magaka mai irikova.
buyer_notification_prefs.title: Notifications
buyer_notification_prefs.hero_sub: Saqa na ka vua ena iko bell. Na notifications sa vua sa isau — na toggles ena contol na future ones.
buyer_notification_prefs.info_critical: Critical security alerts and order issues sa rawa ni vikiraki ki na iko email, even kana muted here.
legal_hub.title: Legal & Policies
legal_hub.hero_sub: Na terms na iko sa vuci kana sa sign up, plus shipping, returns and seller obligations.
legal_hub.couldnt_load: Sa sa dukaka na load policies
legal_hub.footer_line: Allsale Ltd · Registered in New Zealand
legal_page.couldnt_load_title: Sa sa dukaka na load na page
legal_page.couldnt_load_default: Sa sa dukaka na load policy
ambassadors_landing.title: Ambassador Programme
ambassadors_landing.unavailable: Programme details sa sa tabu. Please try again.
ambassadors_landing.hero_sub: Become an Allsale Ambassador. Share your code, earn commission on every order — up to {{pct}}% per sale.
ambassadors_landing.section_how_you_earn: How you earn (NZ · AU · US · UK · CA)
ambassadors_landing.tier_footnote: Your customers get {{pct}}% off when they use your code.
ambassadors_landing.india_p1: ₹{{bounty}} bounty per new seller (after {{trigger}} shipped orders) plus {{hot}}% of platform fees for {{months}} months (cap ₹{{cap}}) and {{tail}}% lifetime tail.
ambassadors_landing.india_p2: Indian Ambassadors also get a customer code — drive both diaspora sales abroad AND seller signups in India.
ambassadors_landing.feature_cookie_sub: Your customers stay attributed for 90 days
ambassadors_landing.join_footnote_prefix: Free to join · No minimums · Withdrawals from
buyer_checkout_status.paid_sub: Your order is confirmed and on its way from India to your NZ doorstep.
buyer_checkout_status.unpaid_sub: We didn't receive a payment confirmation. Your cart is still saved — try again whenever you're ready.
buyer_checkout_status.confirming_sub: Please wait while we verify your payment with Stripe.
buyer_country.hero_sub: Authentic products from India, delivered worldwide. Pick your country to get the right prices and shipping.
buyer_country.app_banner_sub: Faster checkout · Order tracking · Exclusive deals
buyer_prohibited.title: Allowed in NZ?
buyer_prohibited.hero_title: Check if NZ MPI lets it in
buyer_prohibited.hero_sub: Type the product you want to ship from India. We'll tell you if it's allowed under NZ biosecurity rules.
buyer_prohibited.common_body: Homemade food · Dairy (ghee, milk powder, cheese, butter) · Meat (beef, chicken, mutton) · Fresh fruit & vegetables · Seeds · Honey · Live plants · Soil
buyer_referrals_simple.title: Kokai na go yalewa
buyer_referrals_simple.hero_title: Vakayaco ni pts. Kauta ni pts.
buyer_referrals_simple.hero_sub: Veisautaki o nomu code kina na go yalewa. Ira na kauta +{{rewardee}} pts. O ikoroi na kauta +{{referrer}} pts eraa ka moku una n kena ibalebale.
buyer_referrals_simple.empty: Sa sega ni kokai. Veisautaki o nomu code kina vakalevu ni kauta! ✨
buyer_saved_searches.title: I kaila na senikena
buyer_saved_searches.empty_title: Sa sega ni i kaila na senikena
buyer_saved_searches.empty_body: Vakarau na masu tale kina sa dua na vaega page kabu lesu na "Salavata na senikena oqo" kina vakolevu ni kauta kina dua kina.
buyer_saved_searches.delete_msg: E tu kina nai salavata kina era nai kena taimi.
ambassadors_join.title: Bati kina
ambassadors_join.lead: Kua baleta mai ira na kena ibalebale mo nomu. Kami na kauta na nomu code kina taqi.
ambassadors_join.india_banner_text: O ikoroi na kauta ni customer code (₹5% sega + 5% commission) KABA NI seller-recruit code (₹5K bounty + 10% rev-share). Moku tale na ibalebale vakavanua kabu na seller raisi.
ambassadors_join.disclaimer: Eraa ka bati kina ko ikoroi na sa tiko kina na Ambassador Programme T&Cs. Codes e tu baleta kabu stable — eraa ka kauta e sega ni vakabagabagai.
ambassadors_join.err_email: Tiko kina e dua na email e sa kina
ambassadors_join.welcome_set_password: Kauta na password vinaka na Settings kina kina vakalevu ni kauta vakatabaqu kina sa dua na iba device.
ambassadors_join.welcome_done: O ikoroi na sa tiko na Allsale Ambassador.
tax.in_gst_inclusive: GST na yani kina na kena masu (18%)
admin_analytics.title: A/B Analytics
admin_analytics.err_load_funnel: Sa sega ni kauta na funnel
admin_analytics.err_load_recent: Sa sega ni kauta na recent
admin_analytics.empty_body_suffix: from your client.  Data appears here within seconds.
admin_analytics.sig_small: ⚠️  Sample size too small for any conclusion — wait for more exposures.
admin_analytics.sig_thin: ⚠️  Conversions are still thin.  Aim for ≥ 30 per arm before judging.
admin_analytics.sig_healthy: ✅  Sample size looks healthy.  Calculate p-value externally for a formal call.
admin_analytics.sig_gathering: ℹ️  Sample looks reasonable but still gathering.  Keep monitoring.
ambassadors_dashboard.title: Ambassador
ambassadors_dashboard.share_msg: Use my code {{code}} on Allsale for {{suffix}}! https://allsale.co.nz/?ref={{code}}
ambassadors_dashboard.withdraw_queued_bo: {{amount}} — you'll receive it within a few business days.
ambassadors_dashboard.share_suffix_b2b: 3 months Pro free when you join as a seller
ambassadors_dashboard.content_sub: Paste any social post URL where you tagged Allsale. We need {{n}}/mo to keep your tier active.
ambassadors_dashboard.sales_empty: No sales yet. Share your code to start earning!
ambassadors_dashboard.sellers_empty: No referred sellers yet. Share your business code with founders you know.
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_title_banned: Na akawunti e sega ni daidai
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_title_rejected: Na aplikasoni e sega ni raici
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_sub_banned: Na akawunti oqo e sega ni daidai na para sa Ambassador Programme.
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_sub_rejected: Bula {{name}} — na kami na sa rai na na aplikasoni mo keda na sega ni o ikovi na kami na veilivataki.
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_can_reapply_no: O koya na sa i-aplikasi vou na
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_can_reapply_on: O koya na sa i-aplikasi vou na sara
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_btn_unavailabl: E sega ni daidai na i-aplikasi vou
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_title: Na aplikasoni mo e rai noi
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_sub: Vinaka {{name}} — na kami na gauna ni rai na aplikasoni e 2 ni ra ni bisinisi. Na kami na sa ibaibai iko na email sara na e raici na na code mo e rai.
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_code_label: Na code mo (e sega vei ni live na)
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_terms_pending: Lailai na rai — na bisinisi ni vakasama, na ibaibai na iloloma, na koda ni vakaveidokai.
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_terms_accepte: Na kena bisinisi na gagau na kami e raici na na aplikasoni mo sara na 2 ni ra ni bisinisi.
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_title: E sega ni vakacegu na email?
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_sub: I-vakatavutavu vou na aplikasoni ni kena kuqiji e {{email}}
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_rate_l: Na likiliki na sa vakatavutavu e tiko na keda na sa dua ni vakatavutavu e tiko na ra.
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_sent_b: Rai na na inbox mo (keda na rai na na spam folder, me keda na vaki)
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_signin: Na cakacaka e peri na veiwekani
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_timeline_titl: Oqo na ka e tiko na vua na
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_timeline_3: Na kami na rai (1-2 ni ra ni bisinisi)
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_timeline_4: O koya na vakacegu na email keda na na code mo e rai
seller_bulk_upload.title: Bulk upload
seller_bulk_upload.hero_title: Dua na vakavi o valave na vata ni gauna na tiko
seller_bulk_upload.hero_body: E dui na vakabula na katalogo na levu. I-download na template, sara na products mo e Excel / Google Sheets, me i-upload vou na. Na kami e tikina na kila kila na kada na tiko sara na e waica na waiwai.
seller_bulk_upload.tile_export_csv_sub: Valave na presij / stock na bulk
seller_bulk_upload.tip_prefix: Na kada na vakavata e dua na product. Waica na
seller_bulk_upload.tip_middle: na gauna ni dua na lisilisi vou, o valave na keda na sa dua. Gauna na
seller_bulk_upload.tip_suffix: na sa vakavata na sizes, colors keda na image URLs.
seller_bulk_upload.zip_subtitle: Reference filenames e na sheet mo — na kami e baita na real URLs.
seller_bulk_upload.zip_failed_title: ZIP upload e gauna ni siga
seller_bulk_upload.upload_hint: Sa 1000 rows · max 8 MB · gauna na image URLs (na kami e toka na vakatavua na vua)
seller_bulk_upload.file_failed_title: E sega ni vakavalokataki na file
seller_bulk_upload.nothing_title: E sega na dua na vakatavua
seller_bulk_upload.nothing_body: Na kada ni gauna na errors. Me talanoa keda na cakacaka vou.
seller_bulk_upload.download_failed_body: E sega ni ka download na file.
seller_bulk_upload.success_body: {{c}} na create · {{u}} na update · {{s}} na skip
sell_banner.compact_prefix: E na nomu na bisinisi vei India?
sell_banner.card_subtitle: Veiliutaki ni nomu na yaliyali kina na Allsale kena vakadidiraki na taucoko mai NZ. Bisinisi vakarehisteri i India niuqoqo.
